name: IOC Lens

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Added defang functionality
- Accessible through the command palette and editor context menu

Improved IOC view responsiveness
- Sidebar now updates instantly in response to settings changes such as search engines being enabled or disabled

Search engine button improvements
- Hover tooltip now displays the complete search engine name

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/acgabbert/IOC-Lens/compare/1.0.2...1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

* Add GreyNoise Integration for IOC Lookups by @prashanthpulisetti in https://github.com/acgabbert/IOC-Lens/pull/2

## New Contributors

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/acgabbert/IOC-Lens/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial release of IOC Lens.

IOC Lens is a note-taking helper for Obsidian focused on cyber security and incident response. Activate the IOC Lens sidebar view with the ribbon icon or the provided command, accessible via the Command Palette.

IOC Lens currently supports the following IOC types:

- IPv4
- IPv6
- Domain names
- File hashes (SHA256, MD5)
